lyrics.text: Anywhere you are, I am near
lyrics.translation: 不管你在哪儿，我都会在你身边。

lyrics.text: Anywhere you go, I'll be there
lyrics.translation: 不管你去哪儿，我都将会在那里。

lyrics.text: Anytime you whisper my name, you'll see
lyrics.translation: 你任何时候轻呼我的名字，你都会看到

lyrics.text: how every single promise I'll keep
lyrics.translation: 我是如何信守对你的每个承诺

lyrics.text: Cause what kind of guy would I be
lyrics.translation: 造就了我将会是怎样的人

lyrics.text: If I was to leave when you need me most
lyrics.translation: 如果我在你最需要我的时候离开。

lyrics.text: What are words
lyrics.translation: 算什么承诺啊

lyrics.text: If you really don't mean them
lyrics.translation: 当你完全口是心非

lyrics.text: When you say them
lyrics.translation: 说出它们的时候

lyrics.text: What are words
lyrics.translation: 算什么承诺啊

lyrics.text: If they're only for good times
lyrics.translation: 如果只存在于美好的时刻

lyrics.text: Then they don't
lyrics.translation: 那么便不是

lyrics.text: When it's love
lyrics.translation: 当爱至情浓处时

lyrics.text: Yeah, you say them out-loud those words
lyrics.translation: 你大声喊出自己的心声

lyrics.text: They never go away
lyrics.translation: 那些话，永远都不会褪色

lyrics.text: They live on, even when we're gone
lyrics.translation: 即使我们都离去了，它们会一直存在，直到海枯石烂。

lyrics.text: And I know an angel was sent just for me
lyrics.translation: 我知道，你是上苍赠予我的天使

lyrics.text: And I know I'm meant to be where I am
lyrics.translation: 我知道，这是命运的安排

lyrics.text: And I'm gonna be standing right beside her tonight
lyrics.translation: 今晚我会守在你身旁

lyrics.text: And I'm gonna be by your side
lyrics.translation: 我会一直守护在你身边

lyrics.text: I would never leave when she needs me most
lyrics.translation: 当你最需要我的时候，我绝不会离你而去

lyrics.text: What are words
lyrics.translation: 什么是承诺啊

lyrics.text: If you really don't mean them
lyrics.translation: 当你完全口是心非

lyrics.text: When you say them
lyrics.translation: 说出它们的时候

lyrics.text: What are words
lyrics.translation: 什么是承诺啊

lyrics.text: If they're only for good times
lyrics.translation: 如果只存在于美好的时刻

lyrics.text: Then they don't
lyrics.translation: 那么便不是

lyrics.text: When it's love
lyrics.translation: 当爱至情浓处时

lyrics.text: Yeah, you say them out-loud those words
lyrics.translation: 你大声喊出自己的心声

lyrics.text: They never go away
lyrics.translation: 那些话，永远都不会褪色

lyrics.text: They live on, even when we're gone
lyrics.translation: 即使我们都离去了，它们会一直存在，直到海枯石烂。

lyrics.text: Anywhere you are, I am near
lyrics.translation: 不管你在哪儿，我都会在你身边。

lyrics.text: Anywhere you go, I'll be there
lyrics.translation: 不管你去哪儿，我都将会在那里。

lyrics.text: And I'm gonna be here forever more
lyrics.translation: 我将会永远在哪里

lyrics.text: Every single promise I'll keep
lyrics.translation: 对你信守的每个承诺

lyrics.text: Cause what kind of guy would I be
lyrics.translation: 造就了我将会成为的样子

lyrics.text: If I was to leave when you need me most
lyrics.translation: 如果我在你最需要我的时候离开。

lyrics.text: I'm forever keeping my angel close
lyrics.translation: 我会永远守护在我的天使身边
